mission.title: atlantis: Atlantis unlock fails to delete plan of environment with project name
mission.description: Atlantis unlock fails to delete plan of environment with project name. This issue affects 28+ users.

steps.title: Identify atlantis troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your atlantis deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis -n atlantis --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review atlantis configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant atlantis configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
kubectl get configmap -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=atlantis
```
https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/issues/3750 changed the behaviour of `atlantis unlock` which used to trigger a deletion of the whole directory where the PR is checked out in favour of only deleting the plan file.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Atlantis unlock fails to delete plan of environment with…
steps.description:
## what

In the `DeleteLocksByPull` function, replace the `deleteWorkingDir` function call with `WorkingDir.DeletePlan` so that only the plan files are deleted for the lock rather than the whole working directory.

Improved logging has also been added to the `events_controller`,
```yaml
---
version: 3
projects:
  - name: dev 
    dir: clusters/dev/config
    workflow: dev
    terraform_version: v1.5.7
    autoplan:
      enabled: true
      when_modified:
      - "*.tf*"
```

steps.title: Confirm Atlantis unlock fails to delete plan of… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis -n atlantis --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n atlantis --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
## what

In the `DeleteLocksByPull` function, replace the `deleteWorkingDir` function call with `WorkingDir.DeletePlan` so that only the plan files are deleted for the lock rather than the whole working directory.

Improved logging has also been added to the `events_controller`, `unlock_command_runner` and `delete_lock_command`.
codeSnippets:
---
version: 3
projects:
  - name: dev 
    dir: clusters/dev/config
    workflow: dev
    terraform_version: v1.5.7
    autoplan:
      enabled: true
      when_modified:
      - "*.tf*"

│ no such file or directory","json":

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with atlantis installed or the issue environment reproducible.
